message:
style: clippy and rustfmt cleanup across CLI, hook, and pack modules

Apply automated formatting corrections from rustfmt and address clippy
lints throughout the codebase. No behavioral changes.

- cli.rs: reformat println!/eprintln! calls to single-line where they
  fit, reformat multi-line assert! and fs::write calls for consistency
- hook.rs: consolidate multi-line let bindings, use raw string r"{}"
  instead of r#"{}"# where no inner quotes exist, reformat writeln!
  warning output
- redis.rs: use raw string literal for CONFIG SET regex pattern
- supabase.rs: collapse single-element PatternSuggestion slices to
  inline form, reformat safe_pattern! macro calls to single-line where
  they fit, remove unnecessary blank lines between pack sections,
  consolidate multi-line assert_blocks! calls in tests
- strict_git/mod.rs: reorder use imports alphabetically

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -176,7 +176,7 @@ fn create_destructive_patterns() -> Vec<DestructivePattern> {
         // CONFIG SET save can disable RDB persistence
         destructive_pattern!(
             "config-set-save",
-            r#"(?i)\bCONFIG\s+SET\s+save\b"#,
+            r"(?i)\bCONFIG\s+SET\s+save\b",
             "CONFIG SET save can disable RDB persistence entirely, risking data loss on restart.",
             High,
             "CONFIG SET save \"\" disables all RDB snapshots:\n\n\
